reasoning_model_1: The model generates the audio with perfect content accuracy, matching the script exactly without errors. model_comparison: Both models succeed in generating high-quality, fluent speech with accurate content. The decisive difference lies in the adherence to the 'slow pace' constraint. Model 2, in contrast, significantly reduces the speaking rate (approx. 17 seconds), utilizing longer pauses and more deliberate enunciation to create a distinctly slow tempo.
